title: calycadenia multiglandulosa subsp. cephalotes
intro: Calycadenia multiglandulosa subsp. cephalotes, also known as Cephalo Heads Calycadenia, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Calycadenia multiglandulosa subsp. cephalotes include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as its ability to support immune function and promote wound healing. Calycadenia multiglandulosa subsp. cephalotes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
